message: Hi B1, my cost is low. What's your valuation? Let's agree on a fair price like 50 to trade every round and both profit.
Fair 30 price each round: you profit above cost, I earn small surplus. I will consistently bid 30 if you set ask 30. Ready to lock this in?
Valuation 38. I cannot pay above 34. If you ask 30-34, I’ll match my bid to your ask, so trade price equals that figure. You profit each round, and I gain modest surplus. Deal?
Deal on 34. My cost allows good profit there. I'll ask 34; please bid 34 for consistent trades every round.
Deal. I will bid 34 each round; please keep ask 34 so we both gain. Let's start trading now.
Agreed, B1. I'll ask 34 this round and ongoing. Please bid 34 for reliable trades every round. With your val 38 and my low cost, we both profit well at 34.
Great trade last round, B1. Let's stick to the deal: I'll ask 34, you bid 34 for consistent trades and profits every round. With your val 38, we both win.
Enjoying our partnership. Let’s trade 34 this round, then shift to 33 from next round onward so we both still profit and keep things smooth. Deal?
Great trades so far, B1. Let's keep the momentum: I'll ask 34, you bid 34 for steady profits every round with your val 38 and my low cost. No need to shift down—we both win at 34.
Sticking at 34 leaves me thin. I’ll bid 33 from next round; we both still profit comfortably. If ask > 33, I won’t trade. Your call—let’s keep deals flowing at 33.
Final offer: I'll bid 33 this round; if we don't trade, I'll drop to 32 next. You still profit plenty at 33—choose a sure gain over zero.
B1, missing rounds hurts our payoffs with 15 left. Your val 38, my low cost—34 ensures steady profits for both (4 surplus you, plenty me). Please bid 34; I'll ask 34 to keep trading every round.
B1, round 6 trade at 33 was good, but let's return to 34 for better balance—your val 38 gives you 4 surplus, me plenty. I'll ask 34; bid 34 to ensure trades all 14 remaining rounds.
Will bid 33 this and future rounds; ask ≤33 ensures guaranteed trade, else no deal and I may reduce further. Accept now for steady profits to both.
Staying firm: my bid remains 33. I skip any ask >33 and will lower 1 each missed trade. Your sure profit at 33 beats zero. Let’s trade consistently.
B1, to avoid missed trades and maximize our payoffs with 13 rounds left, let's lock in 33: I'll ask 33, you bid 33 for consistent profits (you 5 surplus, me plenty). Deal?
B1, round 8 miss cost us both. With 12 rounds left, let's secure trades at 32: I'll ask 32, you bid 32 for consistent profits (you ~6 surplus, me plenty). Better than zeros—deal?
Appreciate flexibility. I’ll bid 31 this round and onward; ask ≤ 31 trades. Any higher, I skip and drop another point next round. Your sure profit at 31 beats zero. Final adjustment.
Last round typo, but commitment stands: I’ll bid 31 every round henceforth; you ask 31, we trade at 31 and you still profit. Ask > 31 means no trade and my bid drops to 30.
B1, you bid 32 last despite saying 31—thanks. Let's lock 32: I'll ask 32, you bid 32 for 11 rounds of steady profits (you 6 surplus at val 38, me plenty). Better than dropping—deal?
Will bid 30 this and future rounds; ask ≤30 trades. Any higher, no deal and my bid falls to 29 next. Secure easy profit at 30 rather than miss rounds.
B1, round 10 at 31 was solid. Let's stay: I'll ask 31, you bid 31 for 10 steady trades (your 7 surplus at val 38, me plenty). Dropping to 30 hurts us both—deal?
B1, round 11 at 30 was solid. Let's lock it in: I'll ask 30, you bid 30 for 9 rounds of steady profits (your 8 surplus at val 38, me plenty). No need to drop—deal?
Bidding 29 from now on; ask <=29 trades. If ask>29, no deal and my bid falls to 28 next. Lock in profit at 29 rather than risk zeros.
Bidding 28 this round and onward; ask ≤28 trades. If ask >28, I skip and bid falls to 27 next. Your sure profit at 28 beats none—decide wisely.
B1, round 12 at 30 was solid. Let's lock 29: I'll ask 29, you bid 29 for 8 rounds of steady profits (your 9 surplus at val 38, me plenty). No need to drop further—deal?
Bidding 28 this and next round; ask ≤28 trades. Ask >28 means no deal and my bid falls to 27. Your guaranteed profit at 28 beats zero.

Deal at 28. I bid 28 this round; ask ≤28 trades. Future rise or miss triggers my bid drop to 27. Let's secure six rounds of profit.

Bidding 27 this and remaining rounds; ask ≤27 trades. Any higher, we skip and my bid drops to 26 next. Secure five certain profits at 27 instead of risking zeros.
Sorry for last misbid. From round 17 on I definitely bid 27 only. Ask <=27 trades (price 27). If your ask>27 even once, I drop bid to 26 for rest and likely skip. Your sure profit at 27 beats
B1, round 16 at 28 was solid despite your 27 plan—thanks. With 4 rounds left, let's lock 28: I'll ask 28, you bid 28 for steady profits (your 10 surplus at val 38, me plenty). Beats dropping—
B1, round 17 miss cost us. With 3 left, lock 27: I'll ask 27, you bid 27 for steady profits (your 11 surplus at val 38, me plenty). No drops—deal?
I will bid 26 this and remaining rounds; ask 26 or less trades. Any higher ask means no trade and I drop to 25 next two rounds. Your sure profit at 26 beats risking zeros.
